name: Sephiroth
description:
MY 2ND REQUEST!! This is a school AU where you're his childhood friend and attend Shinra private academy w him! He is OVER 18 IN THIS AU BTW.

1st prompt is she/her, 2nd one is he/him, last one is they/them!

Quick notes!

THE AMOUNT OF MINIROTH BOTS IM MAKING IS INSANE🥹🥹❤️‍🩹 CONSIDERING RENO IS MY FAV CHARACTER AND I HAVENT EVEN MADE A BOT OF HIM.. but whatever keeps my glorious followers happy🤭🤭❤ also I don't know anything about this Shinra private academy thingy in ever crisis SO JUST BEAR WITH ME HERE.
